voting_rule: Each KNN estimator predicts probabilities from its selected feature subset; BaggingClassifier averages class probabilities across all 200 estimators, then sklearn predict chooses the class with highest averaged probability.

estimated_cost.note: RAM can be kept low by storing prototypes/feature subsets in flash/PROGMEM and streaming distances per estimator. Flash cost is high relative to Model B.
